title: Exclude milestone tasks from tasks page

log.context: Exclude milestone tasks from tasks page

Done. Added the filter on line 589 of `/mnt/data/hello-world/tasks.html`, right after `_lastTasks = tasks;`. The filtered array is used for all subsequent bucketing and passed to `updateSummary`, so milestone entries are excluded from both the task list and the summary counts.

Commit hash: `4307c13`
